title: Teriyaki Beef Salad with Sweet Chilli Couscous
description: Tender sliced beef rump in a teriyaki glaze served over sweet chilli couscous with fresh cucumber, tomato, and scallion.

steps.instruction: Dissolve stock in 200ml boiling water; remove from heat, stir in couscous, cover for 8–10 minutes.
Slice onion thinly, cube tomatoes, dice cucumber, quarter lime, and slice scallions.
Heat oil in a pan; thinly slice beef and cook 1–2 minutes per side; season with salt and pepper.
Add onion to the pan, fry 1–2 minutes, then stir in teriyaki sauce and 50ml water; warm 2–3 minutes.
Fluff couscous with a fork; mix in sweet chilli sauce, cucumber, tomato, and lime juice.
Divide couscous between bowls, top with beef and teriyaki sauce, and garnish with scallions and lime wedges.
